def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd; import numpy as np; import ta
    atr = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=params['atr_window']).average_true_range()
    rolling_high = df['high'].rolling(window=params['range_window']).max()
    rolling_low = df['low'].rolling(window=params['range_window']).min()
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[df['close'] > rolling_high + atr * params['atr_multiplier']] = 1
    signals[df['close'] < rolling_low - atr * params['atr_multiplier']] = -1
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: NZD/USD exhibits range breakout behavior when price breaches volatility-adjusted rolling high/low levels.
